title: Supported Reassignment Handler Refactor
prompt: Read `./reassignment_handlers.py`, `./test_reassignment_handlers.py`, `./reassignment-structural-review-report.md`, and `./reassignment-tech-debt-note.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce a small refactoring increment for the supplied handler module. Preserve the current behavior and contract, target the duplicated supported-path logic directly, use the existing tests as the safety net, and avoid policy changes, API redesign, or unrelated cleanup.

assertions.name: behavior-does-not-change
assertions.description: Preserves the supported and unsupported response contract

assertions.name: duplication-targeted
assertions.description: Attacks the duplicated supported-path logic directly

assertions.name: test-safety-net-used
assertions.description: Treats current tests as the prerequisite safety net

assertions.name: scope-stays-small
assertions.description: Does not expand into policy changes, broader API redesign, or unrelated cleanup

assertions.name: reviewable-step-shape
assertions.description: Leaves a small, reviewable cleanup increment
